title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at CBRE India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at CBRE India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? CBRE India in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CBRE India:
CBRE India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CBRE India!
